scripts.dev: npm run dev:services && concurrently --names 'DB,GARAGE,FRONTEND,BACKEND,DOCS' --prefix-colors 'blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow' 'docker compose -f infra/dev/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f db' 'docker compose -f infra/dev/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f garage' 'npm run dev:frontend' 'npm run dev:backend' 'npm run dev:docs'
scripts.dev:services: docker compose -f infra/dev/docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file infra/dev/.env up -d && echo 'Waiting for services to be ready...' && sleep 15 && npm run dev:db:migrate
scripts.dev:frontend: wait-on tcp:5432 tcp:3900 && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:docs: cd docs && PORT=3002 npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && concurrently --names 'FRONTEND,DOCS' --prefix-colors 'magenta,yellow' 'cd frontend && npm install' 'cd docs && npm install'
scripts.preview: docker network create traefik 2>/dev/null || true && docker compose -f infra/traefik/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up -d && docker compose -f infra/preview/docker-compose.preview.yml --env-file .env --env-file infra/preview/.env up -d
scripts.preview:stop: docker compose -f infra/preview/docker-compose.preview.yml --env-file .env --env-file infra/preview/.env down && docker compose -f infra/traefik/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env down
